testcase.failure:
url_contains: Final URL should contain /success; observed=http://127.0.0.1:3020/refund text_exists: Visible text should include Refund request submitted; observed=Refund request

testcase.name: refund-form / http-failure
testcase.failure: text_exists: Visible text should include Refund request submitted; observed=Tripwire injected HTTP failure no_console_error: No console errors should be recorded; observed=Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 503 (Service Unavailable)
